title: Euphorbia antsingiensis
taxonomy: Euphorbia antsingiensis is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. This classification places Euphorbia antsingiensis within the order Malpighiales. The genus Euphorbia itself is a group of succulent plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Euphorbiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Euphorbia belonging to the subfamily Euphorbioideae. Euphorbia antsingiensis's classification reflects its unique adaptations and evolutionary history as a succulent plant.
